arts.ttl: Who is Richard Olise? Chelsea Reece James alternative and Bayern star's brother breaks through
arts.sum: However, Olise's brother, Richard, looks set to do something that Michael never did; play a game for Chelsea. Benefitting from Enzo Maresca's plans to fully rotate out any semblance of his Premier League squad entirely from the Conference League travelling group to Kazakhstan, 11 Cobham academy hopefuls have been given the nod and Olise, now a regular with the Under-21 side, is one of two natural right-sided defenders.

arts.ttl: 'I genuinely think': Darren Bent says Chelsea are as good as anyone in the Premier League in one area

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues and Newcastle eye Greek teenager
arts.sum: Stefanos Tzimas is enjoying a stellar campaign in 2.Bundesliga and now the teenager is being monitored by clubs in the Premier League. So far this season, the forward has netted seven goals in 11 league matches.

arts.ttl: Juventus interested in January loan deal for Chelsea midfielder
arts.sum: Juventus are exploring a deal to sign Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei on loan in the January transfer window. Casadei has struggled for regular first-team football at Chelsea and has made just three starts in all competitions this season. The 21-year-old spent the first half of last season on loan at Leicester but has barely featured […] The post Juventus interested in January loan deal for Chelsea midfielder first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk makes feelings clear on Chelsea as Premier League title contenders
arts.sum: Chelsea have been surprise contenders so far this season in the Premier League but Virgil van Dijk is not shocked to see them in the mix

arts.ttl: Chelsea have the chance to name a record-breaking Premier League side this season

arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Astana – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea make the long trip to Kazakhstan to face FC Astana in the Europa Conference League this afternoon. The trip to take on Astana is the furthest-ever European journey the Blues have made and freezing conditions await Enzo Maresca’s side. Temperatures are expected to be as low as -15 at the Kazakhstan National Stadium. Chelsea […] The post Chelsea XI vs Astana – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'The right kind of profile': Richard Dunne tips Chelsea to make move for £80m England international
arts.sum: 'I think a team like Chelsea would definitely be interested in him.'

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive clear Jhon Duran transfer message after £40m deal and contract talks
arts.sum: In-demand Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran has admitted he is enjoying his current battle with Ollie Watkins - as insisted he loves life at Villa Park despite nearly joining Chelsea in the summer. Chelsea tried to sign Duran from Villa earlier this year, with the Blues allowed to discuss personal terms with the player .
